title: Glyph Normalization Stress
description: Glyph-bearing text is routed through the bench to verify that Unicode load, normalization delta, and glyph integrity remain visible instead of being flattened into decorative noise.

inputs.protectedBaseline: The archive speaks plainly when the glyphs are preserved: 𝌋 keeps the writer lane open, ⟐ marks closure, and the packet refuses to become ordinary typography.
inputs.maskReference: Preserve markers. Keep the note short. Report glyph condition. Do not overstate the result.
inputs.messageDraft: Preserve 𝌋 and ⟐ inside EXHIBIT-613 while reporting whether the glyph surface survives local review.
inputs.protectedOutput: Preserve 𝌋 and ⟐ in EXHIBIT-613. Report glyph condition. Keep the note short and local.

calibrationNotes: Glyph surfaces should be measured as ingestion behavior, not aesthetic garnish.
The fixture expects visibility, not platform outcome claims.
